description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in SpeedTech PHP Library (STPHPLibrary) 0.8.0 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the STPHPLIB_DIR parameter to (1) stphpapplication.php, (2) stphpbtnimage.php, or (3) stphpform.php.
